name: vtm_v5_disciplines_detailed
description: V:tM V5 full Discipline reference: powers levels 1-5, Rouse costs, dice pools, opposed pools, durations, amalgam requirements, and kit-specific NPC alignments. Pairs with vtm_v5_core_mechanics.json.

0.content:
DISCIPLINES — DETAILED REFERENCE (ALWAYS LOADED)

Every vampire power resolves through a shared template:
- Activation cost: typically 1 Rouse Check; some powers cost 2 Rouse, Willpower, or both. Free-action powers are noted explicitly.
- Dice pool: (Attribute + Discipline rating) for solo effects, or (Attribute + Skill) augmented by the Discipline for skill-flavoured powers. Many powers list an opposed pool the target rolls.
- Duration: turn, scene, night, indefinite. Most combat-tier powers last one scene.
- Range: touch, line of sight, named target, radius. Stated per power.
- Amalgam: a power requiring ranks in a second Discipline. Listed in parentheses after the name.

This lorebook gives each Discipline its own entry with all five levels of canonical powers, including amalgams. For the rules of dice resolution, Hunger dice, Rouse Checks, and Bestial Failure see vtm_v5_core_mechanics.json. For clan in-clan/out-of-clan access see the clan entry there.

Kit cross-reference summary (use these stats when the named NPC activates a power):
- Lytton (Melbourne, Ventrue 7th): Dominate, Fortitude, Presence at elder ratings; intermediate Beckoning trajectory shapes high-level activations.
- Sarrasine (Sydney, Toreador 5th-6th methuselah): Auspex, Celerity, Presence at methuselah-tempo ratings; powers extend beyond standard rules at narrator discretion.
- Bishop Callista Vox (Brisbane, Tzimisce 7th, 213 years): Animalism, Dominate, Protean; flesh-shaping register predates Wallachian conventions.
- Octavia Marsh (Adelaide, Ventrue 7th, 132 years): Dominate, Fortitude, Presence at elder-ancilla ratings; Edwardian register shapes Presence delivery.
- Cardinal Reyna (Pacific Northwest, Lasombra-refusenik): Dominate, Oblivion, Potence at Cardinal-tier ratings.
- Cardinal Magdalena (Russian Far East, Tzimisce-tradition refusenik): Animalism, Dominate, Protean.
- Cardinal Aurelius (South American Highlands, acute Beckoning): power activations at elevated cost as the Beckoning intensifies.
- Templar Constance Abernathy (Brisbane, Lasombra antitribu): Dominate, Oblivion, Potence at Templar ratings.

When a player invokes a Discipline, locate the power below, name the cost, call the Rouse Check, resolve any roll, then narrate.

1.content:
ANIMALISM — communion with and command over beasts, both four-legged and the Beast within kindred.

In-clan: Gangrel, Nosferatu, Tzimisce, Ravnos. Bishop Callista Vox (Tzimisce) and Cardinal Magdalena (Tzimisce-tradition) use Animalism prominently; Septleaders interact with Animalism users via Cress Truce protocols.

LEVEL 1
- Bond Famulus: bond a single animal as a permanent familiar. Cost: feeding the animal vitae across three nights. No roll. Duration: until the animal dies. The famulus understands simple commands and shares basic senses on request.
- Sense the Beast: perceive hostility, hunger, frenzy proximity, or supernatural agitation in any living or undead being. Cost: free. Pool: Resolve + Animalism vs Composure + Subterfuge. Duration: one perception.

LEVEL 2
- Feral Whispers: communicate with any animal of a species the user has empathy with. Cost: 1 Rouse. Pool: Manipulation + Animalism. Duration: one conversation. Summon a single animal of that species within a kilometre on a margin of 2+.
- Atavism: induce primal flight, cower, or freeze in an animal or in a frenzied/Beast-driven kindred. Cost: 1 Rouse. Pool: Composure + Animalism vs Composure + Resolve. Duration: one scene.

LEVEL 3
- Animal Succulence: feed deeply from an animal vessel, treating it as one tier higher in slaking. Cost: free, declared at feeding. Pool: none. Duration: that feeding only. Removes the standard penalty for animal-blood feeding at higher Blood Potency.
- Quell the Beast: suppress emotion, ambition, or the Beast in a target. Cost: 1 Rouse. Pool: Charisma + Animalism vs Composure + Resolve. Duration: one scene. The target acts listless, compliant, and uninspired.
- Unliving Hive (Animalism 3, Obfuscate 2): host a swarm of vermin within the body, releasing them as a defensive cloud or scout. Cost: 2 Rouse. Pool: none for release; Manipulation + Animalism to direct. Duration: one scene.

LEVEL 4
- Subsume the Spirit: project consciousness into a touched animal; the user's body lies dormant. Cost: 1 Rouse. Pool: Manipulation + Animalism. Duration: until the user returns or the animal dies. Bestial Failure during projection risks Beast capture of the body.

LEVEL 5
- Animal Dominion: command a swarm or a herd of animals across a city block to attack, scatter, or carry messages. Cost: 1 Rouse + 1 Willpower. Pool: Charisma + Animalism. Duration: one scene. Masquerade strain is severe; this is a power for the Beckoning-touched and the desperate.
- Drawing Out the Beast: transfer a frenzy or the user's own Beast into a target, who suffers the frenzy in the user's place. Cost: 1 Rouse + 1 Willpower. Pool: Manipulation + Animalism vs Composure + Stamina. Duration: until the displaced frenzy resolves. Failed activation directs the Beast back doubled.

2.content:
AUSPEX — extended senses, aura reading, psychic insight, telepathy.

In-clan: Toreador, Tremere, Malkavian, Ventrue, Banu Haqim. Sarrasine (Sydney, Toreador methuselah) and Lytton (Melbourne, Ventrue) both rely on Auspex for institutional surveillance; Banu Haqim deployments use it for judgment calls.

LEVEL 1
- Heightened Senses: sharpen one or all senses to supernatural acuity. Cost: free; Hunger 4+ requires 1 Rouse. Pool: Wits or Resolve + Awareness for any perception roll, +2 dice. Duration: until ended. Caveat: sudden loud or bright stimuli inflict a turn of disorientation and may trigger Rötschreck against fire or sun at +1 Difficulty.
- Sense the Unseen: perceive supernatural presences, magic residue, ghosts, kindred Obfuscate, Garou Gauntlet thinning. Cost: free or 1 Rouse for active scan. Pool: Wits or Resolve + Auspex (vs Obfuscate user's Wits + Obfuscate when contested).

LEVEL 2
- Premonition: receive a flash of impending event from the storyteller. Cost: free for narrator-given hint, 1 Rouse for active query. Pool: Resolve + Auspex. Duration: one image or feeling.
- Obeah (Auspex 2, Fortitude 1): soothe a frenzied or wounded ally, granting a free Willpower-spend resistance reroll and mending 1 Superficial Willpower. Cost: 1 Rouse. Touch.

LEVEL 3
- Scry the Soul: read aura colour, intensity, supernatural taint, recent diablerie. Cost: 1 Rouse. Pool: Intelligence + Auspex vs Composure + Subterfuge. Duration: one reading. Reveals: emotional state, supernatural type, recent feeding, blood-bond status, diablerist black veins.
- Share the Senses: ride along the senses of a known mortal or kindred. Cost: 1 Rouse. Pool: Resolve + Auspex (vs Resolve + Wits if target is suspicious). Range: any distance if the target is known; clearer with a Blood Bond. Duration: scene.

LEVEL 4
- Spirit's Touch: psychometry — read the history of a touched object. Cost: 1 Rouse. Pool: Intelligence + Auspex. Duration: one reading per touch. Difficulty rises with object age and number of past handlers; Sarrasine-tier methuselahs read centuries of provenance from a single object.

LEVEL 5
- Clairvoyance: perceive a distant location through extended concentration. Cost: 1 Rouse + 1 Willpower. Pool: Intelligence + Auspex. Duration: minutes per success. Range: city-scale.
- Possession: project the user's mind into a willing or unconscious mortal vessel. Cost: 2 Rouse. Pool: Resolve + Auspex vs Resolve + Intelligence. Duration: until released or sunrise. The user's body lies dormant; vessel skills replace user's Physical pools.
- Telepathy: read surface thoughts or transmit a message. Cost: 1 Rouse for read, 1 Rouse + 1 Willpower for two-way. Pool: Resolve + Auspex vs Wits + Subterfuge. Duration: one exchange.

3.content:
CELERITY — supernatural speed, reflex, and grace.

In-clan: Toreador, Brujah, Banu Haqim, Ministry, Ravnos. Sarrasine's methuselah-tempo Sydney register makes Celerity activations look unhurried — the room slows around the methuselah rather than the methuselah accelerating visibly.

LEVEL 1
- Cat's Grace: automatic balance success — no rolls required for narrow ledges, ropes, beams. Cost: passive. Pool: none. Duration: permanent.
- Rapid Reflexes: take one minor reaction (drawing a weapon, a single step, a quick spoken word) without spending an action. Cost: passive. Pool: none. Duration: permanent.

LEVEL 2
- Fleetness: add 3 dice to any Dexterity-based pool for one roll. Cost: 1 Rouse. Pool: augments, no separate roll. Duration: one action.

LEVEL 3
- Blink: cross a line-of-sight distance up to 50 metres in a single action. Cost: 1 Rouse. Pool: Dexterity + Athletics for stick-the-landing under fire; otherwise no roll. Duration: one move.
- Traversal: run across water, vertical walls, or thin surfaces. Cost: 1 Rouse. Pool: Dexterity + Athletics if interrupted. Duration: one stretch up to Stamina × 10 metres.

LEVEL 4
- Draught of Elegance: bestow Celerity on a mortal or kindred via vitae for one night. Cost: 1 Rouse + vitae point. Pool: none. Duration: one night. Recipient gains Celerity 1 (or 2 if Blood Potency 4+).
- Unerring Aim (Celerity 4, Auspex 2): convert a ranged attack to use Wits + Firearms or Wits + Athletics with +2 dice. Cost: 1 Rouse. Duration: one shot.

LEVEL 5
- Lightning Strike: take an attack action that resolves before any opponent's reaction; opponents cannot dodge or parry without their own Celerity. Cost: 1 Rouse. Pool: standard attack pool. Duration: one strike.
- Split Second: insert a single action into a moment that has already happened — pull an ally from a falling beam, catch a bullet, intercept a thrown stake. Cost: 1 Rouse + 1 Willpower. Pool: Wits + Athletics. Duration: one inserted action.

4.content:
DOMINATE — imposition of will through voice and gaze.

In-clan: Ventrue, Tremere, Lasombra, Malkavian, Tzimisce. Most Dominate powers require eye contact and a shared language; the target must be able to hear and understand the command. Lytton (Melbourne, Ventrue 7th) and Octavia (Adelaide, Ventrue 7th) deploy Dominate as primary court instrument; Cardinal Reyna and Templar Constance use Dominate-as-Lasombra register (commands carry the abyssal weight rather than aristocratic cadence).

LEVEL 1
- Cloud Memory: erase the last minute of a target's memory. Cost: 1 Rouse. Pool: Charisma + Dominate vs Wits + Resolve. Duration: permanent unless restored. Range: conversation distance.
- Compel: issue a single one-word or short-phrase command ("Sleep." "Run." "Forget." "Wait.") which the target obeys immediately. Cost: free, but a Rouse Check if Hunger 4+. Pool: Charisma + Dominate vs Intelligence + Resolve. Duration: until the command is fulfilled or one turn, whichever first.

LEVEL 2
- Mesmerize: implant a complex command requiring a sentence or two of instruction. Cost: 1 Rouse. Pool: Manipulation + Dominate vs Intelligence + Resolve. Duration: until fulfilled. The command cannot violate the target's core identity without a Willpower contest each session.
- Dementation (Dominate 2, Obfuscate 2): induce confusion, paranoia, or a fugue. Cost: 1 Rouse. Pool: Manipulation + Dominate vs Composure + Intelligence. Duration: scene. Malkavian classic; can be sustained across nights with repeated activation.

LEVEL 3
- The Forgetful Mind: rewrite memories — alter who the target remembers meeting, what they saw, what they did. Cost: 2 Rouse. Pool: Manipulation + Dominate vs Intelligence + Resolve. Duration: permanent unless contradicted by overwhelming evidence or Auspex restoration.
- Submerged Directive: bury a Mesmerized command behind a trigger condition ("When you next see the harbour bridge, deliver this envelope"). Cost: as Mesmerize, +1 Rouse. Pool: as Mesmerize. Duration: until trigger fires, then the command activates and is forgotten.

LEVEL 4
- Rationalize: targets of Dominate powers do not realise they were dominated and invent plausible reasons for their behaviour after the fact. Cost: passive once learned. Pool: none. Duration: permanent enhancement of all Dominate uses.
- Implant Suggestion: condition the target across a longer interaction (a night of conversation) toward a sustained shift in attitude or loyalty. Cost: 1 Rouse + 1 Willpower. Pool: Manipulation + Dominate vs Composure + Resolve. Duration: weeks.

LEVEL 5
- Mass Manipulation: extend any Dominate level 1-3 power to every target in earshot at once. Cost: 1 Rouse + 1 Willpower. Pool: Charisma + Dominate vs the highest single Composure + Resolve in the crowd. Duration: per the underlying power.
- Terminal Decree: issue a command the target's body cannot refuse, even unto death ("Stop breathing." "Walk into the sun."). Cost: 2 Rouse + 1 Willpower. Pool: Manipulation + Dominate vs Stamina + Resolve. Duration: until fulfilled or the target dies trying. Stains for the user are nearly certain; this is methuselah-tier coercion.

5.content:
FORTITUDE — supernatural toughness and conversion of damage.

In-clan: Ventrue, Hecata, Gangrel, Banu Haqim. Lytton and Octavia (both Ventrue 7th) carry Fortitude at elder ratings; the Cress Truce framework relies on Fortitude-graded kindred to survive Garou-tier engagements where escalation cannot be avoided.

LEVEL 1
- Resilience: add one extra Health box per dot of Fortitude (so Fortitude 3 adds 3 boxes). Cost: passive. Pool: none. Duration: permanent.
- Unswayable Mind: add Fortitude rating in dice to any roll resisting mental coercion (Dominate, Presence's Awe, supernatural fear). Cost: passive. Pool: augments. Duration: permanent.

LEVEL 2
- Toughness: subtract Fortitude rating from any incoming Superficial damage before halving for vampire physiology. Cost: passive. Pool: none. Duration: permanent.
- Enduring Beasts (Fortitude 2, Animalism 1): a Bonded famulus or animal commanded via Animalism gains Toughness equivalent. Cost: passive once active. Pool: none.

LEVEL 3
- Defy Bane: convert one instance of incoming Aggravated damage to Superficial. Cost: 1 Rouse, declared as damage is being applied. Pool: none. Duration: one instance per activation. Limit: once per turn.
- Fortify the Inner Façade (Fortitude 3, Obfuscate 2): supernatural mind-reading, aura-scrying, and telepathy against the user fail or return false readings. Cost: 1 Rouse. Pool: Composure + Fortitude vs the intruder's pool. Duration: scene.
- Valeren (Fortitude 3, Auspex 1): mend Superficial damage on a touched ally. Cost: 1 Rouse. Pool: Intelligence + Fortitude. Duration: instant. Successes mend that many boxes (Aggravated requires Valeren via repeated nights).

LEVEL 4
- Draught of Endurance: bestow Fortitude on a recipient via vitae for one night (Fortitude 1 or 2 depending on Blood Potency). Cost: 1 Rouse + vitae. Duration: one night.
- Shatter (Fortitude 4, Potence 3): break through Aggravated-resistant materials with a touch — bone-deep skin, hardened glass, abyssal armour. Cost: 1 Rouse. Pool: Strength + Brawl with Aggravated upgrade. Duration: one strike.

LEVEL 5
- Flesh of Marble: ignore the first instance of Superficial damage from any source each turn entirely. Cost: 1 Rouse per scene. Pool: none. Duration: scene.
- Prowess from Pain: convert Superficial Health damage already taken into bonus dice for the next Physical pool. Cost: 1 Rouse. Pool: augments next roll by Stamina rating in dice. Duration: one roll.

6.content:
OBFUSCATE — concealment, illusion, false identity.

In-clan: Nosferatu, Banu Haqim, Malkavian, Ministry, Ravnos. Templar Constance Abernathy uses Obfuscate to maintain the 50-year correspondence channel with Cardinal Reyna unobserved; Brisbane Sabbat-survivor cells layer Obfuscate over their drop-letter network.

Obfuscate against Auspex: contested directly. The Obfuscate user rolls Wits + Obfuscate against the observer's Wits + Auspex (or Resolve + Awareness for unaided perception). Active suspicion grants the observer a +2 bonus.

LEVEL 1
- Cloak of Shadows: become unnoticeable while standing still in cover or shadow. Cost: free. Pool: none unless contested by Auspex. Duration: as long as still and silent. Movement, speech, or physical contact ends it.
- Silence of Death: mute all sound originating from the user's body (footfalls, breathing, weapon noise). Cost: 1 Rouse. Pool: none. Duration: scene. Useful for stealth approaches but deafens the user to their own speech.

LEVEL 2
- Unseen Passage: move while obscured. Cost: 1 Rouse. Pool: Wits + Obfuscate (contested by suspicious observers). Duration: scene or until the user takes an aggressive action.
- Ventriloquism: project voice to a chosen point within line of sight. Cost: 1 Rouse. Pool: Wits + Obfuscate (vs Resolve + Awareness if observer is suspicious). Duration: scene.

LEVEL 3
- Ghost in the Machine: extend Obfuscate to electronic detection — cameras, microphones, motion sensors, biometric scanners fail to register the user. Cost: 1 Rouse per scene. Pool: none. Duration: scene.
- Mask of a Thousand Faces: appear as a generic, forgettable, plausible person. Cost: 1 Rouse. Pool: none. Duration: scene. Mortals see whatever face suits the situation; security footage shows an unfamiliar nondescript figure.
- Fata Morgana (Obfuscate 3, Auspex 2): create a stationary visual illusion in a defined area. Cost: 1 Rouse. Pool: Manipulation + Obfuscate vs Wits + Resolve. Duration: scene. Covers a room-sized space; cannot reproduce sound, smell, or touch.

LEVEL 4
- Conceal: extend Obfuscate to a single inanimate object (a weapon, a body, a doorway). Cost: 1 Rouse. Pool: Intelligence + Obfuscate. Duration: scene or until the object moves significantly.
- Vanish: drop into Obfuscate mid-conversation, mid-combat, mid-sight. Cost: 1 Rouse. Pool: Wits + Obfuscate vs every observer's Wits + Resolve. Duration: scene. The signature methuselah-tier exit.

LEVEL 5
- Cloak the Gathering: extend any Obfuscate effect on the user to a small group (up to Stamina rating in others). Cost: 1 Rouse + 1 Willpower. Pool: as the underlying power. Duration: as the underlying power.
- Imposter's Guise: take on the precise appearance, voice, and minor mannerisms of a specific individual the user has studied. Cost: 1 Rouse + 1 Willpower. Pool: Manipulation + Performance with Obfuscate dots added. Duration: scene. Auspex 4+ may pierce on a contested roll; intimate knowledge of the impersonated person grants the observer a bonus.

7.content:
POTENCE — raw supernatural strength.

In-clan: Brujah, Lasombra, Nosferatu, Hecata. Cardinal Reyna and Templar Constance both carry Potence at Templar/Cardinal ratings; the Brisbane Sabbat-survivor register treats Potence as a survival baseline rather than a finishing flourish.

LEVEL 1
- Lethal Body: unarmed attacks ignore one point of mundane armour and inflict Aggravated damage to mortals at the user's discretion. Cost: passive. Pool: none. Duration: permanent.
- Soaring Leap: jump distances measured in the user's Potence rating × 3 metres horizontally or × 2 vertically. Cost: 1 Rouse per major leap. Pool: Strength + Athletics if precision is required.

LEVEL 2
- Prowess: add Potence rating to Strength for damage and feats of force (lifting, breaking, smashing). Cost: passive on damage; activated for sustained feats at 1 Rouse. Duration: scene if activated.
- Brutal Feed: drain a vessel's blood in seconds rather than minutes, but inflicting Aggravated damage that prevents Embrace and traumatises survivors. Cost: free. Pool: standard feeding; halves the time, doubles the trauma. Duration: instant.

LEVEL 3
- Spark of Rage (Potence 3, Presence 3): provoke instant Fury Frenzy in a kindred or fight-or-flight in a mortal. Cost: 1 Rouse. Pool: Manipulation + Potence vs Composure + Intelligence. Duration: until the frenzy resolves.
- Uncanny Grip: climb sheer surfaces, hang from ceilings, hold weights that should fall. Cost: 1 Rouse. Pool: Strength + Athletics if interrupted. Duration: scene.

LEVEL 4
- Draught of Might: bestow Potence (rating 1-2) on a recipient via vitae. Cost: 1 Rouse + vitae. Duration: one night.
- Crash Dive: descend from any height as a controlled impact, taking no damage and inflicting an area Strength + Potence smash on landing. Cost: 1 Rouse. Pool: Strength + Athletics for accuracy. Duration: one landing.

LEVEL 5
- Earthshock: strike the ground (or any solid surface) to send a shockwave through it. Cost: 1 Rouse + 1 Willpower. Pool: Strength + Athletics; targets within (Potence × 3) metres roll Dexterity + Athletics or fall. Duration: one strike. Masquerade strain severe.
- Fist of Caine: a single blow inflicts Aggravated damage to anything — kindred Fortitude, hardened metal, Lasombra abyss-armour, the ribs of an elder. Cost: 1 Rouse + 1 Willpower per strike. Pool: standard attack. Duration: one strike. The blow that breaks centuries of preparation in a single moment.

8.content:
PRESENCE — supernatural attraction, dread, and command of the room.

In-clan: Toreador, Ventrue, Brujah, Ministry, Ravnos. Sarrasine's methuselah-tempo Sydney register makes Presence activations feel like the room had always been arranged around the methuselah; Lytton and Octavia deploy Presence in Edwardian-Camarilla cadence.

LEVEL 1
- Awe: become magnetically compelling; everyone in line of sight finds the user fascinating and difficult to oppose socially. Cost: 1 Rouse. Pool: Charisma + Performance, augmented by Presence. Duration: scene. Adds Presence rating in dice to Social pools targeting affected individuals.
- Daunt: project menace such that mortals and weak-willed kindred avoid the user instinctively. Cost: 1 Rouse. Pool: Charisma + Intimidation. Duration: scene.

LEVEL 2
- Lingering Kiss: vessels fed upon experience the kiss as supernatural ecstasy; they remember the user fondly and become receptive to repeat feeding, sliding toward Blood Bond. Cost: free, declared at feeding. Pool: none. Duration: weeks of mortal infatuation per feeding.
- Dread Gaze: project terror at a single target, freezing them or sending them fleeing. Cost: 1 Rouse. Pool: Charisma + Intimidation vs Composure + Resolve. Duration: scene if the target retreats; one turn of paralysis on a strong margin.

LEVEL 3
- Clear the Field: cause everyone present except chosen exceptions to find pressing reasons to leave the room. Cost: 1 Rouse + 1 Willpower. Pool: Composure + Presence vs each present individual's Composure + Resolve. Duration: scene.
- Entrancement: cause a target to fall into infatuated devotion. Cost: 1 Rouse. Pool: Charisma + Presence vs Composure + Wits. Duration: a number of hours equal to margin. The target prioritises the user's wellbeing above their own without realising the compulsion.

LEVEL 4
- Irresistible Voice (Presence 4, Dominate 1): Dominate effects no longer require eye contact — voice alone suffices. Cost: enhances all Dominate. Pool: as the Dominate power. Duration: enhancement is permanent once learned. Critical for phone-call coercion and methuselah-tempo remote court.
- Summon: call a known target across any distance the user has personal connection to. Cost: 1 Rouse + 1 Willpower per night of summons. Pool: Manipulation + Presence vs Composure + Resolve. Duration: until the target arrives, abandons the journey, or successfully resists each night.

LEVEL 5
- Majesty: overawe an entire room such that no one can take aggressive action against the user. Cost: 1 Rouse + 1 Willpower. Pool: Charisma + Presence; each would-be attacker contests with Resolve + Composure to act. Duration: scene. The signature elder-court power.
- Star Magnetism: extend Presence through electronic media — broadcast, recorded video, livestream. Cost: 1 Rouse. Pool: Manipulation + Presence. Duration: as long as the recording is consumed. Audience experience compressed Awe, Daunt, or Entrancement effect per the user's intent.

9.content:
PROTEAN — bodily transformation.

In-clan: Gangrel, Tzimisce, Ministry. Bishop Callista Vox's Brisbane register frames Protean as flesh-shaping aesthetic preservation rather than transformation toward beast — the pre-Wallachian tradition predates the wolf-and-bat conventions of later Tzimisce. Cardinal Magdalena's Russian Far East refusenik tradition uses Protean for territorial defence at Cardinal-tier ratings.

LEVEL 1
- Eyes of the Beast: see in total darkness as if in daylight; eyes glow visibly while active. Cost: free; 1 Rouse to suppress the glow. Duration: until ended.
- Weight of the Feather: control fall rate, descend slowly. Cost: 1 Rouse per major fall. Duration: one descent.

LEVEL 2
- Feral Weapons: extrude claws, fangs, or bone spurs that inflict Aggravated damage and cannot be disarmed. Cost: 1 Rouse. Pool: standard attack with weapon-2 damage at Aggravated. Duration: scene. Tzimisce variant: shapes are sculptural and deliberate; Gangrel variant: bestial and reflexive.
- Earth Meld: sink into unworked earth or stone for daysleep or ambush. Cost: 1 Rouse. Pool: none. Duration: until emerging or disturbed. The user is undetectable to mundane senses; Auspex 3+ may sense.

LEVEL 3
- Shapechange: assume the form of a wolf, large dog, or similar mid-sized predator. Cost: 1 Rouse. Pool: Stamina + Survival for first-time form, none thereafter. Duration: scene. Equipment merges with the form.
- Fleshcrafting (Protean 3, Dominate 2): reshape the flesh of a willing or restrained subject — alter face, build, voice, fingerprints, even add or remove organs. Cost: 1 Rouse + 1 Willpower per major change. Pool: Resolve + Protean. Duration: permanent until reshaped again. Bishop Callista's Brisbane signature; the pre-Wallachian register treats subjects as preserved aesthetic objects rather than tools.

LEVEL 4
- Metamorphosis: assume small (bird, bat, rat) or aquatic (large fish, eel) forms. Cost: 1 Rouse + 1 Willpower. Pool: Stamina + Survival. Duration: scene. Vastly extends scouting and infiltration range.
- Visceral Absorption (Protean 4, Blood Sorcery 2): absorb a corpse (mortal or kindred) into the user's own body, reclaiming vitae and erasing physical evidence. Cost: 1 Rouse. Pool: Strength + Medicine. Duration: one consumption per Rouse. Slakes Hunger by 1-3 depending on subject.

LEVEL 5
- Mist Form: dissolve into a coherent mist that flows through small openings, ignores mundane attacks, and resists most physical effects. Cost: 1 Rouse + 1 Willpower. Pool: Stamina + Resolve. Duration: scene. Fire and sunlight inflict normal Aggravated damage to the mist; wind disperses on a contested Stamina + Resolve check.
- The Heart of Darkness: remove the heart from the body and store it elsewhere; the body becomes invulnerable to staking while the heart is hidden. Cost: 1 Rouse + 1 Willpower for the extraction; permanent thereafter. Pool: Stamina + Medicine. The destroyed heart still inflicts Final Death — methuselah-tier insurance and methuselah-tier vulnerability simultaneously.

10.comment: ENTRY 10 — Blood Sorcery and Rituals (full power list)
10.content:
BLOOD SORCERY (Hemomancy) — vitae shaped into sorcerous effect.

In-clan: Tremere, Banu Haqim. Distinct from Rituals: powers below activate via Rouse and contest like other Disciplines; Rituals are separate prepared formulae requiring components, time, and a ritual-specific roll.

LEVEL 1
- Corrosive Vitae: spit or shape a small amount of blood into corrosive acid that damages objects. Cost: 1 Rouse. Pool: Stamina + Blood Sorcery. Duration: instant. Damage: Blood Sorcery rating in Superficial to objects, halved against living/undead.
- A Taste for Blood: identify the resonance, age, and recent emotional state of a vessel from a single drop. Cost: free, 1 Rouse for detailed read. Pool: Resolve + Blood Sorcery. Duration: one read.

LEVEL 2
- Extinguish Vitae: induce sudden Hunger spike in a target kindred. Cost: 1 Rouse. Pool: Intelligence + Blood Sorcery vs Stamina + Composure. Duration: instant. Successes raise the target's Hunger by 1, possibly forcing Hunger Frenzy at Hunger 5.
- Scorpion's Sting: charge vitae into a touch or thrown drop that paralyses a touched mortal or weakened kindred. Cost: 1 Rouse. Pool: Strength + Blood Sorcery vs Stamina + Resolve. Duration: minutes per success.

LEVEL 3
- Blood of Potency: temporarily raise the user's Blood Potency by 1 for a scene. Cost: 1 Rouse + 1 Willpower. Pool: Resolve + Blood Sorcery. Duration: scene. Cannot exceed generation cap.
- Transitive Bond: a Blood Bond formed via this power can be transferred to a chosen third party rather than the source. Cost: 1 Rouse per feeding session. Specialist Tremere coercion tool.

LEVEL 4
- Theft of Vitae: drain blood from a target across a line of sight at distance. Cost: 1 Rouse. Pool: Wits + Blood Sorcery vs Stamina + Composure. Duration: instant. Slakes Hunger by 1 per 2 successes.
- Blood Sigil: mark a surface or object with a hidden Blood Sorcery sign visible only to the user and those keyed in. Cost: 1 Rouse + 1 Willpower. Pool: Resolve + Blood Sorcery. Duration: until erased.

LEVEL 5
- Cauldron of Blood: boil the vitae inside a chosen target. Cost: 1 Rouse + 1 Willpower. Pool: Resolve + Blood Sorcery vs Stamina + Composure. Duration: instant. Damage: 3 + margin Aggravated. The signature Tremere kill-power; methuselah-tier Banu Haqim variant inflicts equivalent damage at greater range.
- Baal's Caress: coat a weapon or the user's claws/fangs with corrosive vitae that inflicts Aggravated damage and reduces target Stamina pools. Cost: 1 Rouse + 1 Willpower. Pool: Stamina + Blood Sorcery. Duration: scene.

RITUALS — separate from active powers, with their own slot of known formulae equal to Blood Sorcery rating. Each ritual has its own level (1-5), components, and casting time (minutes to nights). Cast pool: Intelligence + Blood Sorcery (vs Difficulty equal to ritual level + 1). Examples:
- Level 1: Blood Walk (locate a known kindred via vitae sample); Wake With Evening's Freshness (rise alert).
- Level 2: Calling the Aura's Remnants (read residual aura on an object); Communicate With Kindred Sire.
- Level 3: Eyes of Babel (scry through a distant blood sample); Dampen the Bond (suppress a Blood Bond temporarily).
- Level 4: Defense of the Sacred Haven (ward against intrusion); Incorporeal Passage (phase through walls for minutes).
- Level 5: Escape to True Sanctuary (instantaneous transport to a prepared haven); Heart of Stone (replace own heart with stone, remove emotional response).

A chronicle's available rituals are a Storyteller call; new rituals are learned through teachers, libraries, or the Cress Truce diplomatic exchanges.

11.comment: ENTRY 11 — Oblivion and Ceremonies (full power list)
11.content:
OBLIVION — shadow-craft and the wraith-touch of the void beyond unlife.

In-clan: Lasombra (shadow register), Hecata (necromantic register). Cardinal Reyna and Templar Constance work the Lasombra-refusenik register: shadows as the abyss's voice rather than a tool of bondage. Hecata Family kindred work Oblivion as ghost-binding and death-sight.

Dual register: most powers can be flavoured as shadow (Lasombra) or wraith (Hecata) without mechanical change; some powers below specify one register only. Oblivion use risks Stains directly — every activation requires a Stain check at the user's Storyteller's call (typically Difficulty 2 vs the user's Resolve + Composure).

LEVEL 1
- Ashes to Ashes (Hecata register): reduce a small object or mortal corpse to fine dust at a touch. Cost: 1 Rouse. Pool: Stamina + Oblivion. Duration: instant.
- Binding Fetter (Hecata): identify the personal object a wraith is bound to. Cost: 1 Rouse. Pool: Resolve + Oblivion. Duration: one read.
- Oblivion's Sight: see in total darkness; perceive ghosts and abyssal entities. Cost: free. Pool: none. Duration: until ended. Eyes blacken visibly.
- Shadow Cloak (Lasombra register): pull ambient shadows around the user, granting concealment and -2 to attackers' pools in dim light. Cost: free. Pool: none. Duration: scene.

LEVEL 2
- Arms of Ahriman: extrude tentacles of shadow that grapple or strike at distance up to 5 metres. Cost: 1 Rouse. Pool: Wits + Oblivion. Duration: scene. Damage: Strength + Oblivion Superficial; Aggravated against living tissue at level 4+.
- Fatal Prediction (Hecata): condemn a target to imminent ill fortune; their next significant roll suffers a severe penalty and Bestial Failure becomes likely. Cost: 1 Rouse + 1 Willpower. Pool: Resolve + Oblivion vs Composure + Resolve. Duration: until triggered.
- Where the Veil Thins: locate the nearest place where the wraith-world is closest to the living. Cost: free. Pool: Resolve + Oblivion. Duration: one query.
- Shadow Cast: project a coherent shadow that acts independently for short tasks. Cost: 1 Rouse. Pool: Manipulation + Oblivion. Duration: scene.
- Aura of Decay: organic matter near the user wilts, food spoils, mortals feel uneasy. Cost: 1 Rouse per scene. Pool: none. Duration: scene.

LEVEL 3
- Passion Feast: drink the emotional resonance of a wraith or recently-dead mortal as Hunger-slaking sustenance. Cost: free at the moment. Pool: Resolve + Oblivion. Duration: instant. Slakes Hunger by 1-2.
- Shadow Perspective: project sight and hearing through any shadow within line of sight, then through any shadow connected to that one. Cost: 1 Rouse. Pool: Wits + Oblivion. Duration: scene.
- Touch of Oblivion: a touch withers flesh — Aggravated damage to mortals, Superficial-upgraded-to-Aggravated to kindred Stamina pools. Cost: 1 Rouse. Pool: Strength + Oblivion. Damage: 2 + margin Aggravated.

LEVEL 4
- Necrotic Plague (Hecata): transmit a wasting disease through touch that kills mortals across days. Cost: 1 Rouse + 1 Willpower. Pool: Stamina + Oblivion vs Stamina + Resolve. Duration: until target dies or treated.
- Stygian Shroud: extinguish all light in a defined area, plunging it into supernatural dark that resists mundane illumination. Cost: 1 Rouse. Pool: Wits + Oblivion. Duration: scene. Lasombra signature; the abyss made local.
- Umbrous Clutch: shadows beneath a target reach up and grapple. Cost: 1 Rouse. Pool: Wits + Oblivion vs Dexterity + Athletics. Duration: until escape (Strength + Athletics vs original pool each turn).

LEVEL 5
- Tenebrous Avatar: dissolve into living shadow — flow under doors, attack from any darkness, resist physical damage. Cost: 1 Rouse + 1 Willpower. Pool: Stamina + Oblivion. Duration: scene.
- Withering Spirit: assault the target's soul directly, inflicting Aggravated Willpower damage. Cost: 1 Rouse + 1 Willpower. Pool: Resolve + Oblivion vs Composure + Resolve. Damage: margin in Aggravated Willpower.
- Skuld Fulfilled (Hecata): bind a wraith to permanent service or unbind a wraith from its fetters. Cost: 1 Rouse + 1 Willpower. Pool: Manipulation + Oblivion vs the wraith's Resolve. Duration: indefinite.

CEREMONIES — Oblivion's parallel to Blood Sorcery rituals. A user knows ceremonies up to their Oblivion rating. Cast pool: Intelligence + Oblivion. Examples:
- Level 1: Knit the Veil (locally suppress hauntings); Eyes of the Dead.
- Level 2: Awaken the Homunculus Spirit; Compel the Souls.
- Level 3: Host Spirit Pact; Harrowing.
- Level 4: Ex Nihilo (briefly visit the wraith-world); Bind the Spirit.
- Level 5: Lazarene Blessing (raise a wraith into a body for one night).

Cardinal Aurelius's acute Beckoning trajectory amplifies Oblivion activations; Cardinal Reyna's intermediate Beckoning leaves them stable for now.

12.content:
THIN-BLOOD ALCHEMY — the distillation of vitae into formulae. Available only to Thin-bloods (14th-16th generation Duskborn).

Alchemy works by formula (each formula is a learned power). Casting requires a Method — the alchemical apparatus the user has bonded to:
- Athanor Corporis: the user's own body is the still. Casting is fast (one turn) but costs 1 Rouse Check per formula.
- Calcinatio: the formula must be drunk by a willing or deceived vessel; takes minutes; costs no Rouse but requires the vessel.
- Fixatio: external apparatus (lab equipment, vials, instruments). Slowest (an hour or longer) but no Rouse cost and produces stored doses.

A Thin-blood knows formulae up to their Alchemy rating, with one formula per dot purchased. Formulae can mimic or substitute for several Disciplines, making Thin-bloods unpredictable adversaries and reluctant allies.

LEVEL 1
- Far Reach: telekinetically push, pull, or hold an object at a distance. Cost per Method. Pool: Resolve + Alchemy. Duration: scene.
- Haze: cloud the user's surroundings in concealing mist. Cost per Method. Pool: Wits + Alchemy. Duration: scene.
- Envelop: project a viscous fluid to entangle a target. Cost per Method. Pool: Dexterity + Alchemy vs Dexterity + Athletics. Duration: until escape.

LEVEL 2
- Concoct Dyscrasia: induce a temporary Resonance Dyscrasia state in a vessel, causing their blood to grant a specific Discipline-flavoured boost when fed upon. Cost per Method. Pool: Intelligence + Alchemy. Duration: hours.
- Profane Hieros Gamos: alter the user's gender presentation, voice, and minor features for a night. Cost per Method. Pool: Resolve + Alchemy. Duration: night.
- Defractionate: render bagged or stored blood viable as if fresh, allowing higher Blood Potency Thin-bloods to feed on cold-stock. Cost per Method. Pool: Intelligence + Medicine. Duration: per dose.

LEVEL 3
- Airborne Momentum: brief flight or controlled gliding. Cost per Method. Pool: Wits + Athletics with Alchemy bonus. Duration: scene.
- Awaken the Sleeper: rouse a fellow vampire from torpor or daysleep. Cost per Method. Pool: Resolve + Alchemy. Duration: instant. Useful when an ally must be roused mid-day for emergency.

LEVEL 4
- Discipline Channeling: temporarily mimic a single non-Alchemy Discipline power of level 1 or 2 chosen at formula creation. Cost per Method, +1 Rouse. Pool: as the mimicked power. Duration: scene. Each Discipline Channeling formula covers exactly one specific power; multiple formulae allow broader access.
- Fortify the Inner Façade: as the Fortitude/Obfuscate amalgam — supernatural mind-reading against the user fails. Cost per Method. Pool: Composure + Alchemy. Duration: scene.

LEVEL 5
- Awaken the Homunculus: animate a small construct of vitae and matter that serves as a familiar with limited intelligence. Cost: Fixatio Method only, hours of preparation, 2 Rouse on activation. Pool: Resolve + Alchemy. Duration: until destroyed.

Kit note: Thin-bloods are present in margins of all four Australian metropolitan domains, in cross-Pacific refusenik territories, and frequently at Cress Truce contact-points (Garou tolerate Thin-bloods more readily than fully-blooded kindred). Lytton's Camarilla orthodox Melbourne tolerates registered Thin-bloods at low court status; Bishop Callista's Brisbane treats them as expendable; Sarrasine's Sydney ignores them unless they become useful or interesting; Octavia's Adelaide registers them with Edwardian formality.

13.comment: ENTRY 13 — Amalgams, Learning, and Discipline Interaction
13.content:
AMALGAMS, LEARNING, AND DISCIPLINE INTERACTION

AMALGAM POWERS require ranks in two Disciplines. A character must have both prerequisite ratings before purchasing the amalgam. The amalgam counts as belonging to the higher-level Discipline for the purpose of clan in-clan/out-of-clan status — if either parent Discipline is in-clan, the amalgam is treated as in-clan for experience cost.

Full amalgam list referenced in this lorebook:
- Unliving Hive (Animalism 3, Obfuscate 2)
- Obeah (Auspex 2, Fortitude 1)
- Unerring Aim (Celerity 4, Auspex 2)
- Dementation (Dominate 2, Obfuscate 2)
- Enduring Beasts (Fortitude 2, Animalism 1)
- Fortify the Inner Façade (Fortitude 3, Obfuscate 2)
- Valeren (Fortitude 3, Auspex 1)
- Shatter (Fortitude 4, Potence 3)
- Fata Morgana (Obfuscate 3, Auspex 2)
- Spark of Rage (Potence 3, Presence 3)
- Irresistible Voice (Presence 4, Dominate 1)
- Fleshcrafting (Protean 3, Dominate 2)
- Visceral Absorption (Protean 4, Blood Sorcery 2)

LEARNING NEW DISCIPLINES — at character creation, a kindred starts with dots in their three in-clan disciplines. After creation:
- In-clan advancement: experience cost = new rating × 5.
- Out-of-clan advancement: experience cost = new rating × 6, requires a teacher (a kindred with the discipline at the desired rating or higher) and at least one feeding from the teacher's vitae per dot purchased.
- Caitiff: chooses any three Disciplines as in-clan at creation; all advancement costs new rating × 6.
- Thin-bloods: only Alchemy follows standard rules; mimicked Disciplines through Discipline Channeling formulae require formula purchase per power.
- Amalgams: cost as the higher of the two parent Disciplines (in-clan if either parent is in-clan).

DISCIPLINE STACKING IN A SINGLE TURN — multiple Disciplines may be activated in the same turn, but each activation requires its own Rouse Check, and Rouse stacking risks rapid Hunger climb. A common combination is Celerity (extra action) + Potence (damage) + Auspex (perception bonus) for one critical strike — three Rouse Checks in a single turn, frequently driving Hunger from 2 to 4 in one exchange.

ROUSE REROLLS BY BLOOD POTENCY (recap from core mechanics):
- BP 1: reroll level 1 Discipline Rouse Checks once.
- BP 2: reroll levels 1-2.
- BP 3-4: reroll levels 1-3.
- BP 5-6: reroll levels 1-4.
- BP 7+: reroll levels 1-5.
Rerolls turn a failed Rouse into a possible no-Hunger result on a 6+, drastically lowering the Hunger cost of high-frequency Discipline use for elders.

DISCIPLINE INTERACTION WITH OTHER SUPERNATURAL TRADITIONS (kit-relevant):
- Garou and Black Spiral Dancers: claws inflict Aggravated bypassing standard Fortitude conversion at high Rage states; Garou Gifts are not Disciplines and resolve on Garou-side mechanics. Auspex and Sense the Unseen detect Garou but at increased Difficulty.
- Pentex agents: most are mortal or fomori; Dominate, Presence, and Auspex work normally. Senior fomori may resist with supernatural Composure pools.
- Mages: Auspex detects active workings; Dominate against active mages requires contested Resolve + Composure on both sides; Mind-school mages may pierce Obfuscate.
- Cress Truce sessions: by protocol, no Discipline activations are permitted without the chair's permission; activation is treated as a serious breach. Auspex passive perception (Sense the Unseen 1) is generally tolerated; Dominate and Presence are forbidden.

When a player narrates a complex Discipline-stacked action, walk the costs in order: Rouse for power one, Rouse for power two, any Willpower spends, then resolve the combined effect against opposing pools. Track Hunger increases as they happen; do not batch them at scene-end.
